metadata.description: SCIQLab Supply Chain AI Agents — demand exception analysis, supplier risk scoring, and a multi-agent orchestrator for end-to-end S&OP reviews.

plugins.name: sciqlab-supply-chain
plugins.description: Three AI agents for supply chain operations: demand exception analyzer (MAPE, WMAPE, bias detection), supplier risk assessment (6-dimension scoring with color-coded Excel reports), and a multi-agent orchestrator that combines both for integrated S&OP reviews.
